title: Classic Analog Wristwatch
description: Minimalist analog watch with leather strap and gold-tone case. Water-resistant design with scratch-resistant glass, perfect for everyday wear or formal occasions.

title: Retro Aviator Sunglasses
description: Classic aviator-style sunglasses with UV400 protection and gradient tinted lenses. Lightweight metal frame with adjustable nose pads for a comfortable fit.

title: Premium Eau de Parfum
description: Luxury fragrance in an elegant glass bottle. Long-lasting scent with notes of citrus, jasmine, and sandalwood. Includes decorative cap and presentation box.

title: Over-Ear Studio Headphones
description: Professional-grade over-ear headphones with cushioned ear cups and adjustable headband. Rich bass and clear highs with passive noise isolation.

title: Vintage Film Camera
description: Compact 35mm film camera with built-in flash and automatic exposure. Classic design with modern reliability, ideal for street photography and travel.

title: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
description: Full-size mechanical keyboard with RGB backlighting and tactile switches. Programmable macro keys, USB-C connection, and detachable wrist rest.

title: Classic White Sneaker
description: Clean white leather sneaker with cushioned sole and breathable lining. Versatile low-top design pairs with casual and smart-casual outfits.

title: Leather Crossbody Handbag
description: Genuine leather crossbody bag with adjustable strap and multiple compartments. Magnetic closure, interior zip pocket, and polished hardware accents.

title: Urban Travel Backpack
description: Durable everyday backpack with padded laptop compartment and multiple organizer pockets. Water-resistant fabric with reinforced stitching.

title: Handcrafted Ceramic Coffee Mug
description: Artisan-style ceramic mug with comfortable handle and smooth glaze finish. Microwave and dishwasher safe, holds 12 oz.

title: Insulated Stainless Steel Water Bottle
description: Double-wall vacuum insulated bottle that keeps drinks cold 24 hours or hot 12 hours. Leak-proof lid with carry loop, BPA-free, 750ml capacity.

title: Essential Cotton T-Shirt Pack
description: Set of premium cotton t-shirts in assorted colors. Pre-shrunk fabric with reinforced crew neck and double-stitched hems.
